description_long: This object appears to be an abstract, low-polygon representation of an adult pedestrian, with angular and faceted surfaces forming the body and limbs. The figure is composed of two main color regions: a brownish area that likely represents the torso and limbs, and a blue area that may indicate clothing or accessories. The form is highly stylized, with exaggerated, elongated limbs and sharp geometric transitions, lacking fine anatomical detail. There are no discernible facial features or fingers, and the overall silhouette is dynamic, suggesting movement or a walking posture. The object is constructed from hard, smooth materials, giving it a modern, sculptural appearance. The figure is not carrying any visible objects and does not have any interactive components.
description: A highly stylized, angular adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated limbs and a mix of brown and blue surfaces, suggesting a dynamic walking pose. The object is abstract and geometric, lacking fine anatomical detail.
description_view_0: This view shows the broad, faceted side of the torso and upper limb, with a prominent blue section at the lower part, possibly representing clothing.
description_view_1: The figure's side is visible, highlighting the sharp transition between the brown and blue regions and the angular construction of the body.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the elongated limbs and the intersection of blue and brown surfaces, with more of the lower body and limb structure visible.
description_view_3: The rear or side of the figure is shown, with the blue lower limb extending backward and the brown upper body dominating the view.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract geometric outfit with stylized upper and lower garment
